reviews.review_description: you only do four orders but first you do three orders or like at least two orders and then you um you it quizzes you on the his stupid game and then this confused taurus tells me what to i recommend i give him the cheesy delight burgers recommendations $7 i give miss food he pays me and and then he tells me that i got his order wrong but i didn't and then he comes back like at least three times that's super confusing this game is the absolute worst do not try it at all this is a huge warning i'm serious do not try anyone else who tries this game you are not listening to my review or the other two reviews of the only reviews on this app okay so listen to me big time .

The game is not user friendly! The cash till doesn’t close after each order. There should be an option to keep the order on the screen to refer back to in case you missed the order the first time. You should be able to physical handle the transaction by running the card or take money and give cash back. You also should have the option of grabbing the actual food. Instructions are not clear. Please fix this game! It has alot of potential.
You do about 4 orders before it quizzes you on the stupidest sh*t, then it just glitches or something?? It doesn’t go beyond that. Don’t do it. It’s seriously the worst
